summary: Gate-evidence review passes; PR creation remains blocked only by the expected stale/current agent-review lifecycle until this review is recorded and closed.
inspection_summary: Inspected HEAD 0c8539d7, review request/dispatch inputs, diffs in src/cli.js, src/pr-manager.js, src/canonical-audit.js, focused tests, story/spec/architecture/SSOT docs, generated pr-prepare/traceability/review artifacts, and reran requested pr prepare views plus focused tests; focused views keep summary-depth behavior and blocker command metadata while full --json remains standard and PR creation stays blocked on stale review lifecycle.
